description: Remedial action usage limitations for a given instant

instant.description: The identifier of the instant of the usage limitations

max-ra.description: The maximum number of remedial actions allowed for the instant

max-topo-per-tso.description: The maximum number of topological remedial actions allowed per TSO for the instant

max-pst-per-tso.description: The maximum number of PST remedial actions allowed per TSO for the instant

max-ra-per-tso.description: The maximum number of remedial actions allowed per TSO for the instant

max-elementary-actions-per-tso.description: The maximum number of elementary actions allowed per TSO for the instant
